description_long: This chair features a minimalist, modern design with a gently curved seat and backrest made from a smooth, light-colored material. The seat and backrest are visually seamless, with four small, round fastener details visible on the seat surface. The legs are crafted from bent wood, forming elegant, arching supports that provide both stability and aesthetic appeal. The wood grain is visible on the legs, contrasting with the plain, matte finish of the seat and backrest. The chair lacks armrests, emphasizing its streamlined silhouette. Its overall appearance suggests a blend of Scandinavian and contemporary influences, suitable for urban environments such as cafes, parks, or waiting areas.
description: A modern chair with a smooth, light-colored seat and backrest, supported by curved wooden legs. The design is minimalist and lacks armrests, with visible fasteners on the seat.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, curved seat and backrest, with four fastener details and the arched wooden legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the continuous curve of the seat and backrest, as well as the elegant arch of the wooden legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad, plain backrest and the symmetrical positioning of the wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the seat's curvature and the bent wood leg structure.
